generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a practical-minded American, I've always believed in being prepared. But let's be honest - the current push for massive civil defense spending is just political theater. We already have strong deterrence through our alliances. Why divert resources from real security needs to build bunkers that will never be used? Smart preparedness means focusing on what actually keeps us safe, not pandering to fear. #NationalSecurity #CommonSense
